title: Peruvian Porridge Bowl
description: A hearty breakfast bowl inspired by Peruvian cuisine, made with a comforting oat porridge and topped with crunchy xeris and a sprinkle of smooth sauce.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
Add the oats and reduce the heat to medium.
Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes or until the oats have absorbed most of the water.
In a small bowl, mix the xeris, smooth sauce, honey, and cinnamon.
Stir the topping mixture into the oat porridge.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until heated through.
Serve hot, topped with additional xeris if desired.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
